contents:
(** The following section defines product algebra [ProdAlgebra].
    Section [bin_prod_algebra] specialises the definition to
    binary product algebra. *)
Context `{Funext} {σ : Signature} (I : Type) (A : I → Algebra σ).

Definition carriers_prod_algebra : Carriers σ
    := λ (s : Sort σ), ∀ (i:I), A i s.

Fixpoint op_prod_algebra (w : SymbolType σ)
      : (∀ i, Operation (A i) w) →
        Operation carriers_prod_algebra w :=
    match w return (∀ i, Operation (A i) w) →
                    Operation carriers_prod_algebra w
    with
    | [:_:] => idmap
    | _ ::: g => λ f p, op_prod_algebra g (λ i, f i (p i))
    end.

Definition ops_prod_algebra (u : Symbol σ)
    : Operation carriers_prod_algebra (σ u)
    := op_prod_algebra (σ u) (λ (i:I), u.#(A i)).

Definition ProdAlgebra : Algebra σ
    := BuildAlgebra carriers_prod_algebra ops_prod_algebra.

goals.conclusion: IsTruncAlgebra n ProdAlgebra

hypotheses.type: forall i : I, IsTruncAlgebra n (A i)

goals.conclusion: IsTruncAlgebra n ProdAlgebra

hypotheses.type: forall i : I, IsTruncAlgebra n (A i)

goals.conclusion: IsTrunc n (ProdAlgebra s)

hypotheses.type: forall i : I, IsTruncAlgebra n (A i)

contents: (** The next section defines the product projection homomorphisms. *)
Context `{Funext} {σ : Signature} (I : Type) (A : I → Algebra σ).

Definition def_proj_prod_algebra (i:I) (s : Sort σ) (c : ProdAlgebra I A s)
    : A i s
    := c i.

Lemma oppreserving_proj_prod_algebra {w : SymbolType σ}
    (i : I) (v : ∀ i : I, Operation (A i) w) (α : Operation (A i) w)
    (P : v i = α)
    : OpPreserving (def_proj_prod_algebra i)
        (op_prod_algebra I A w v) α.

goals.conclusion: OpPreserving (def_proj_prod_algebra i) (op_prod_algebra I A w v) α

hypotheses.type: forall i0 : I, Operation (A i0) w

goals.conclusion: OpPreserving (def_proj_prod_algebra i) (op_prod_algebra I A w v) α

hypotheses.type: forall i0 : I, Operation (A i0) w

goals.conclusion: OpPreserving (def_proj_prod_algebra i) (op_prod_algebra I A [:t:] v) α
OpPreserving (def_proj_prod_algebra i) (op_prod_algebra I A (t ::: w) v) α

hypotheses.type: forall i0 : I, Operation (A i0) (t ::: w)

forall (v0 : forall i0 : I, Operation (A i0) w) (α0 : Operation (A i) w),
v0 i = α0 ->
OpPreserving (def_proj_prod_algebra i) (op_prod_algebra I A w v0) α0

goals.conclusion: OpPreserving (def_proj_prod_algebra i) (op_prod_algebra I A [:t:] v) α
OpPreserving (def_proj_prod_algebra i) (op_prod_algebra I A (t ::: w) v) α

hypotheses.type: forall i0 : I, Operation (A i0) (t ::: w)

forall (v0 : forall i0 : I, Operation (A i0) w) (α0 : Operation (A i) w),
v0 i = α0 ->
OpPreserving (def_proj_prod_algebra i) (op_prod_algebra I A w v0) α0

goals.conclusion:
OpPreserving (def_proj_prod_algebra i) (op_prod_algebra I A (t ::: w) v p)
  (α (def_proj_prod_algebra i t p))

hypotheses.type: forall i0 : I, Operation (A i0) (t ::: w)

forall (v0 : forall i0 : I, Operation (A i0) w) (α0 : Operation (A i) w),
v0 i = α0 ->
OpPreserving (def_proj_prod_algebra i) (op_prod_algebra I A w v0) α0

contents: apply (IHw (λ i, v i (p i)) (α (p i))).

goals.conclusion: v i (p i) = α (p i)

hypotheses.type: forall i0 : I, Operation (A i0) (t ::: w)

forall (v0 : forall i0 : I, Operation (A i0) w) (α0 : Operation (A i) w),
v0 i = α0 ->
OpPreserving (def_proj_prod_algebra i) (op_prod_algebra I A w v0) α0

goals.conclusion: IsHomomorphism (def_proj_prod_algebra i)
IsHomomorphism (def_proj_prod_algebra i)
OpPreserving (def_proj_prod_algebra i) u.#(ProdAlgebra I A) u.#(A i)

contents:
Definition hom_proj_prod_algebra (i : I)
    : Homomorphism (ProdAlgebra I A) (A i)
    := BuildHomomorphism (def_proj_prod_algebra i).
(** The product algebra universal mapping property [ump_prod_algebra]. *)

Definition hom_prod_algebra_mapout
    (f : Homomorphism C (ProdAlgebra I A)) (i:I)
    : Homomorphism C (A i)
    := hom_compose (hom_proj_prod_algebra I A i) f.

Definition def_prod_algebra_mapin (f : ∀ (i:I) s, C s → A i s)
    : ∀ (s : Sort σ) , C s → ProdAlgebra I A s
    := λ (s : Sort σ) (x : C s) (i : I), f i s x.

Lemma oppreserving_prod_algebra_mapin {w : SymbolType σ}
    (f : ∀ (i:I) s, C s → A i s)
    (α : ∀ (i:I), Operation (A i) w) (β : Operation C w)
    (P : ∀ (i:I), OpPreserving (f i) β (α i))
    : OpPreserving (def_prod_algebra_mapin f) β
        (op_prod_algebra I A w (λ i, α i)).

goals.conclusion:
OpPreserving (def_prod_algebra_mapin f) β
  (op_prod_algebra I A w (λ i : I, α i))

hypotheses.type: forall (i : I) (s : Sort σ), C s -> A i s
forall i : I, Operation (A i) w
forall i : I, OpPreserving (f i) β (α i)

goals.conclusion:
OpPreserving (def_prod_algebra_mapin f) β
  (op_prod_algebra I A w (λ i : I, α i))

hypotheses.type: forall (i : I) (s : Sort σ), C s -> A i s
forall i : I, Operation (A i) w
forall i : I, OpPreserving (f i) β (α i)

goals.conclusion:
OpPreserving (def_prod_algebra_mapin f) β
  (op_prod_algebra I A [:t:] (λ i : I, α i))

hypotheses.type: forall (i : I) (s : Sort σ), C s -> A i s
forall i : I, OpPreserving (f i) β (α i)

goals.conclusion:
OpPreserving (def_prod_algebra_mapin f) β
  (op_prod_algebra I A (t ::: w) (λ i : I, α i))

hypotheses.type: forall (i : I) (s : Sort σ), C s -> A i s
forall i : I, Operation (A i) (t ::: w)
forall i : I, OpPreserving (f i) β (α i)

forall (α0 : forall i : I, Operation (A i) w) (β0 : Operation C w),
(forall i : I, OpPreserving (f i) β0 (α0 i)) ->
OpPreserving (def_prod_algebra_mapin f) β0
  (op_prod_algebra I A w (λ i : I, α0 i))

goals.conclusion:
OpPreserving (def_prod_algebra_mapin f) β
  (op_prod_algebra I A [:t:] (λ i : I, α i))

hypotheses.type: forall (i : I) (s : Sort σ), C s -> A i s
forall i : I, OpPreserving (f i) β (α i)

goals.conclusion: def_prod_algebra_mapin f t β i = op_prod_algebra I A [:t:] (λ i0 : I, α i0) i

hypotheses.type: forall (i0 : I) (s : Sort σ), C s -> A i0 s
forall i0 : I, OpPreserving (f i0) β (α i0)

goals.conclusion:
OpPreserving (def_prod_algebra_mapin f) β
  (op_prod_algebra I A (t ::: w) (λ i : I, α i))

hypotheses.type: forall (i : I) (s : Sort σ), C s -> A i s
forall i : I, Operation (A i) (t ::: w)
forall i : I, OpPreserving (f i) β (α i)

forall (α0 : forall i : I, Operation (A i) w) (β0 : Operation C w),
(forall i : I, OpPreserving (f i) β0 (α0 i)) ->
OpPreserving (def_prod_algebra_mapin f) β0
  (op_prod_algebra I A w (λ i : I, α0 i))

goals.conclusion:
OpPreserving (def_prod_algebra_mapin f) (β x)
  (op_prod_algebra I A (t ::: w) (λ i : I, α i)
     (def_prod_algebra_mapin f t x))

hypotheses.type: forall (i : I) (s : Sort σ), C s -> A i s
forall i : I, Operation (A i) (t ::: w)
forall i : I, OpPreserving (f i) β (α i)

forall (α0 : forall i : I, Operation (A i) w) (β0 : Operation C w),
(forall i : I, OpPreserving (f i) β0 (α0 i)) ->
OpPreserving (def_prod_algebra_mapin f) β0
  (op_prod_algebra I A w (λ i : I, α0 i))

goals.conclusion: forall i : I, OpPreserving (f i) (β x) (α i (def_prod_algebra_mapin f t x i))

hypotheses.type: forall (i : I) (s : Sort σ), C s -> A i s
forall i : I, Operation (A i) (t ::: w)
forall i : I, OpPreserving (f i) β (α i)

forall (α0 : forall i : I, Operation (A i) w) (β0 : Operation C w),
(forall i : I, OpPreserving (f i) β0 (α0 i)) ->
OpPreserving (def_prod_algebra_mapin f) β0
  (op_prod_algebra I A w (λ i : I, α0 i))

goals.conclusion: OpPreserving (f i) (β x) (α i (def_prod_algebra_mapin f t x i))

hypotheses.type: forall (i0 : I) (s : Sort σ), C s -> A i0 s
forall i0 : I, Operation (A i0) (t ::: w)
forall i0 : I, OpPreserving (f i0) β (α i0)

forall (α0 : forall i0 : I, Operation (A i0) w) (β0 : Operation C w),
(forall i0 : I, OpPreserving (f i0) β0 (α0 i0)) ->
OpPreserving (def_prod_algebra_mapin f) β0
  (op_prod_algebra I A w (λ i0 : I, α0 i0))

contents:
#[export] Instance is_homomorphism_prod_algebra_mapin
    (f : ∀ (i:I), Homomorphism C (A i))
    : IsHomomorphism (def_prod_algebra_mapin f).

goals.conclusion: IsHomomorphism (def_prod_algebra_mapin (λ i : I, f i))

hypotheses.type: forall i : I, Homomorphism C (A i)

goals.conclusion: IsHomomorphism (def_prod_algebra_mapin (λ i : I, f i))

hypotheses.type: forall i : I, Homomorphism C (A i)

goals.conclusion:
OpPreserving (def_prod_algebra_mapin (λ i : I, f i)) u.#C
  u.#(ProdAlgebra I A)

hypotheses.type: forall i : I, Homomorphism C (A i)

goals.conclusion: forall i : I, OpPreserving (f i) u.#C u.#(A i)

hypotheses.type: forall i : I, Homomorphism C (A i)

goals.conclusion: OpPreserving (f i) u.#C u.#(A i)

hypotheses.type: forall i0 : I, Homomorphism C (A i0)

contents:
Definition hom_prod_algebra_mapin (f : ∀ i, Homomorphism C (A i))
    : Homomorphism C (ProdAlgebra I A)
    := BuildHomomorphism (def_prod_algebra_mapin f).

(** Given a family of homomorphisms [h : ∀ (i:I), Homomorphism C (A i)]
      there is a unique homomorphism [f : Homomorphism C (ProdAlgebra I A)]
      such that [h i = hom_compose (pr i) f], where

<<
        pr i = hom_proj_prod_algebra I A i
>>

      is the ith projection homomorphism. *)

Lemma ump_prod_algebra `{!∀ i, IsHSetAlgebra (A i)}
   : (∀ (i:I), Homomorphism C (A i)) <~> Homomorphism C (ProdAlgebra I A).

goals.conclusion: (forall i : I, Homomorphism C (A i)) <~> Homomorphism C (ProdAlgebra I A)
(forall i : I, Homomorphism C (A i)) <~> Homomorphism C (ProdAlgebra I A)

(λ x : Homomorphism C (ProdAlgebra I A),
 hom_prod_algebra_mapin (hom_prod_algebra_mapout x)) ==
idmap

(λ x : forall i : I, Homomorphism C (A i),
 hom_prod_algebra_mapout (hom_prod_algebra_mapin x)) ==
idmap

(λ x : Homomorphism C (ProdAlgebra I A),
 hom_prod_algebra_mapin (hom_prod_algebra_mapout x)) ==
idmap
hom_prod_algebra_mapin (hom_prod_algebra_mapout f) = f

(λ x : forall i : I, Homomorphism C (A i),
 hom_prod_algebra_mapout (hom_prod_algebra_mapin x)) ==
idmap
hom_prod_algebra_mapout (hom_prod_algebra_mapin f) = f

hypotheses.type: forall i : I, Homomorphism C (A i)

goals.conclusion: hom_prod_algebra_mapout (hom_prod_algebra_mapin f) i = f i

hypotheses.type: forall i0 : I, Homomorphism C (A i0)

contents:
Definition bin_prod_algebras (b:Bool) : Algebra σ
    := if b then B else A.

goals.conclusion: forall b : Bool, IsTruncAlgebra n (bin_prod_algebras b)
forall b : Bool, IsTruncAlgebra n (bin_prod_algebras b)

contents:
Definition BinProdAlgebra : Algebra σ :=
    ProdAlgebra Bool bin_prod_algebras.

Definition fst_prod_algebra : Homomorphism BinProdAlgebra A
    := hom_proj_prod_algebra Bool bin_prod_algebras false.

Definition snd_prod_algebra : Homomorphism BinProdAlgebra B
    := hom_proj_prod_algebra Bool bin_prod_algebras true.
Global Notation "A × B" := (BinProdAlgebra A B) : Algebra_scope.

(** Specialization of the product algebra universal mapping property
    to binary product. *)

Lemma ump_bin_prod_algebra
   : Homomorphism C A * Homomorphism C B <~> Homomorphism C (A × B).

goals.conclusion: Homomorphism C A * Homomorphism C B <~> Homomorphism C (A × B)
Homomorphism C A * Homomorphism C B <~> Homomorphism C (A × B)

contents: set (k := λ (b:Bool), Homomorphism C (bin_prod_algebras A B b)).

goals.conclusion: Homomorphism C A * Homomorphism C B <~> Homomorphism C (A × B)

hypotheses.body: λ b : Bool, Homomorphism C (bin_prod_algebras A B b)

contents:
exact (equiv_compose
            (ump_prod_algebra Bool (bin_prod_algebras A B) C)
            (equiv_bool_forall_prod k)^-1).
